WvW mission. Members must capture an objective within a specific amount of time.

WvW mission. Members must capture and hold an objective; that objective must reach a certain tier within the time limit. Three guild members must participate in the assault event, and must be within the capture radius when the assault event completes. Guilds do not need to claim the objective, they only need to participate in the assault event.
WvW mission. Members must earn a certain amount of world experience within a time limit.
WvW mission. Members must escort caravans to objectives within a specific time limit.
WvW mission. Members work together to complete various WvW tasks and challenges.

Xunlai Jade Personnel DepartmentPerformance Review for employee 44236: Mai TrinPer the work agreement signed between Ms. Trin and Lady Joon, the review has been triggered by the fulfillment of Ms. Trin's probationary period of employment, and it is our recommendation that she be converted to full-time employment with Xunlai Jade.Although unrefined in the area of technical acumen and with limited experience with practical jade tech applications, Ms. Trin has proven herself to be an excellent and adaptable employee, often outperforming her more senior colleagues at certain tasks, though this level of excellence can be sporadic.Ms. Trin has demonstrated core competencies and a natural inclination toward leadership, which more than make up for the limitations she has with specific implementation and individual contributions.Although Ms. Trin is new to Xunlai Jade, she has even impressed Lady Joon herself, though certain aspects of this dynamic remain within sealed documents to which this department does not have access.Final Assessment: Recommended that employee 44236 be offered a full-time employment contract, and granted full access to Xunlai Jade "common" level facilities upon acceptance.

Xuorri was cornered. At last, the centaur hunters had finally caught up with him. As his enemies lifted their swords, he simply closed his eyes and prayed, "Zintl, light my path and guide me toward the Endless Summer." In that moment, Xuorri was engulfed by a radiant light. The hylek's skin warmed under the beams, and when Xuorri opened his eyes, his pursuers writhed on the ground. They had been blinded by the Lifegiver's light, allowing Xuorri a swift escape.

Yo-ho, what lies down below!  Yo-ho, what lies down below!     The deep crawling king,  Us bearkin still sing.  Of lost ones you've torn,  On teeth, they were shorn,  Below into dark depths unknown.    Yo-ho, what lies down below!  Yo-ho, what lies down below!    A fisher forebear,  A cub unaware,  The king claimed his prize.  All thought it unwise,  To swallow the fishmaster's kid.    Yo-ho, what lies down below!  Yo-ho, what lies down below!    A spear lashed with chain,  Her stance like a fane,  Thrown sharp, did it glide.  A thorn in its side,  Gutted, the salty king fled.    Yo-ho, what lies down below!  Yo-ho, what lies down below!    Keen Hook held the line,  Northbound on the brine.  The Deep Crawler brawled  Through Janthiri squalls.  Tossed closer to dark stoney shores.    Yo-ho, what lies down below!  Yo-ho, what lies down below!    A flash of white light,  Coursing, did smite.  The Deep Crawler dead,  Keen looked on with dread.    Yo-ho, what lies down below!  Yo-ho, what lies down below!    Washed up on the beach,  With blade in paw, breached.  The dead crawler's gut,  With fervor she cut.  Fishing her silent cub free.    Yo-ho, what lies down below!  Yo-ho, what lies down below!
